## Meeting purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration on programmatic SEO and content generation for Hightouch](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hightouch is interested in scaling their content production, particularly for programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Growth Acts (Marcel/Jimmy's company) offers AI-assisted content generation with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [A trial/calibration article will be produced to demonstrate capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Wed, Sept 4 at 1pm ET to review sample content](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Hightouch SEO efforts

  - [Successfully implemented programmatic SEO for product comparisons and SQL dictionary](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Generating \~30k new monthly visitors, but struggling to convert this traffic](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Want to focus on more ICP-relevant keywords (e.g. marketing use cases, loyalty programs)](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Currently producing 4-5 high-quality blog posts per month with 2-person team](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Using paid backlink agency, but advised to discontinue this](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

### Growth Acts' approach

  - [Use AI to generate initial content, then have human editors refine](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Scrape top search results to inform content structure](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Implement custom workflows for different content types](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Produce up to 100k words/month for $9k](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [No long-term contracts, month-to-month after 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Seeing strong ranking results for clients like Ramp, Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

### Content quality concerns

  - [Luke worried about accuracy for technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Marcel explained multi-step verification process:](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
    1.  AI-assisted research/outline
    2.  Human editor review
    3.  Expert fact-checking when needed
  - [Aim for 70-80% completion via AI, then human polish to 90-100%](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Trial/next steps

  - [Luke to provide 2 keywords with POV for sample articles](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)
  - [Growth Acts to produce calibration content before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)
  - [Will add Luke to Slack channel for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to send 2 keywords + POVs to Growth Acts team via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)
  - [Growth Acts to produce sample article(s) before Sept 4 meeting](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)
  - [Reconvene Sept 4 at 1pm ET to review sample content and discuss potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/M_5XgBdBz_zeY9ZYzDtaujS2hXFUsi6s?tab=summary&timestamp=2987.0)
